basic_details.job_title: ACTREC Assistant Security Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for Assistant Security Officer Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the ACTREC office with original documents and self-attested copies.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Civilian: Max 27 years. Ex-Servicemen: Discharged or retired from Arm Force during the last 05 years.
age_limit.details: Civilian Candidates: Maximum age limit is 27 years. Ex-Servicemen: Discharged or retired from the Arm Force during the last 05 years shall only be eligible to apply.

qualification.details: Ex-Servicemen: Qualification equivalent to graduation certificate from Armed Forces or from any recognized university. Ex-servicemen who have rendered minimum 15 years of service with rank of Havildar/Sergent/Petty Officer or above. Civilian Candidates: Graduation from a recognized University and should be in possession of NCC ‘C' certificate. Candidate with work experience of minimum 5 years as Security Officer / Security Supervisor / Security Assistant in a large Civil Organization / Hotel / Hospital / Airport with good Public Relations qualities.

salary_details.details: Consolidated salary of ₹35,000/- p.m. based on experience over and above specified eligibility criteria.

selection_process: Written Test (General Awareness & Basic Security related Questions) Skill Test

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Assistant Security Officer. This is a contract-based position at ACTREC.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Assistant Security Officer post. This is a single opening announced by ACTREC.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this job?
faq.answer: The application mode for this job is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Security Officer post?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary offered is ₹35,000/- per month, based on experience over and above the specified eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for Civilian candidates?
faq.answer: Civilian candidates must have a Graduation from a recognized University and possess an NCC ‘C' certificate. Additionally, 5 years of relevant experience is required.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for Civilian candidates?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Civilian candidates is 27 years. Candidates should ensure they meet this criterion.

faq.question: Q7. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview date is 23 June 2026. Candidates should plan their travel accordingly.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates need to bring their Bio-data, recent passport size photograph, scanned copies of Aadhar Card, PAN CARD, and ORIGINAL and Self-Attested copies of qualification and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test covering General Awareness & Basic Security related Questions, followed by a Skill Test.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview venue is Meeting Room - 306, 3rd floor, Paymaster Shodhika, TMC-ACTREC, Sec-22, Kharghar, Navi Mumbai- 410210.
